thought.text: Now that the previous command has been interrupted, I can install Tailwind CSS.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"summary":"Install Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, and Autoprefixer.","command":"npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer","security_risk":"MEDIUM"}

summary: Install Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, and Autoprefixer.
